family_context.preferred_cover_geography: Georgia and Germany, ideally worldwide excluding the US

method_notes: This AC 50101 artifact records whether a current public brochure, policy wording PDF, table of benefits, plan description, or similar downloadable plan document was directly accessible during this run.
Direct accessibility was only marked true when a live fetch returned a public PDF URL or a reviewed public page exposed a clearly plan-relevant downloadable PDF link.
Generic legal/compliance PDFs such as privacy, cookie, complaints, or modern-slavery statements were intentionally excluded from plan-document verification.
Null/false means not found in reviewed public sources during this run, not necessarily unavailable from gated quote flows, alternate locales, or broker portals.
